Hero.title: Pioneer of Precision Measurement
Hero.subtitle: Innovative solutions and reliable technology in laboratory equipment.

Categories.title: Innovative Solutions
Categories.editorialDescription: World-class equipment portfolio designed for the most demanding analyses.

WhySection.title: Trust, Quality and Uninterrupted Technical Support
WhySection.description: As a Germany-based distributor with a global reach, we offer not just equipment, but end-to-end expertise, competitive pricing, and dedicated service — from consultation to after-sales support.
WhySection.certifiedTrustDesc: We offer products and services certified to international standards.
WhySection.support247Desc: Our expert team is always by your side, providing uninterrupted technical support.
WhySection.testimonialQuote: Atamanlab has been our trusted partner for laboratory equipment. Their expertise and fast delivery make all the difference.

Corporate.aboutDescription1: Atamanlab was founded in Germany in 2009 and has been operating in the field of laboratory equipment with an emphasis on export. Although our company has a relatively short history, our experience in the sector spans well over ten years.
Corporate.aboutDescription2: We have established strong commercial partnerships with prominent manufacturing companies in Germany and other parts of Europe. Our company places great emphasis on providing assistance to our potential and actual clients before and after transactions. In this context, we take pleasure in sharing our experiences with our customers.
Corporate.founderQuote: Reliability in laboratory technology is measured not only by product quality, but by the people behind it.
Corporate.visionDescription: To become Europe's most trusted laboratory equipment supplier, serving as a global reference point in scientific research and industrial quality control. We see our customers' success as our own and strive to build long-term, sustainable business partnerships.
Corporate.missionDescription: To provide laboratories worldwide with the highest quality equipment and consumables at competitive conditions, leveraging our strong partnerships with leading manufacturers in Germany and Europe. To deliver end-to-end service through pre-sales consultancy and after-sales technical support.
Corporate.vp1Desc: Direct distribution agreements with leading manufacturers in Germany and Europe.
Corporate.vp2Desc: Export-focused service and logistics solutions for laboratories worldwide.
Corporate.vp3Desc: End-to-end technical support from product selection to installation and maintenance.
Corporate.vp4Desc: We work exclusively with certified products manufactured to European standards.
Corporate.vp5Desc: Everything from laboratory equipment to consumables with over 40 brand partners.
Corporate.vp6Desc: Quick delivery times thanks to our Germany-based logistics infrastructure.

Products.title: Our Products
Products.description: Discover laboratory equipment suited to your needs from our wide product range.

ContactPage.heroSubtitle: Contact us for your laboratory equipment needs.
ContactPage.formDescription: Fill out the form for product information, price quotes, or technical support requests. Our team will get back to you as soon as possible.
ContactPage.successMessage: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

BrandsPage.label: Our Partners
BrandsPage.title: Our Brands
BrandsPage.description: We work with world-renowned manufacturers to provide the highest quality equipment and consumables for your laboratory.

Solutions.label: Services
Solutions.title: Our Solutions
Solutions.subtitle: From laboratory equipment procurement to technical support, consulting to logistics, we offer end-to-end solutions.
Solutions.s1Desc: We supply original laboratory instruments, analytical equipment, and measurement systems from leading European manufacturers.
Solutions.s2Desc: Wide portfolio of consumables including glassware, filters, pipette tips, chemicals, and disposable materials.
Solutions.s3Desc: We protect your laboratory with chemical storage cabinets, personal protective equipment, and safety systems.
Solutions.s4Desc: Free consultation from our expert team for optimal equipment selection tailored to your laboratory needs.
Solutions.s5Desc: Fast and secure worldwide delivery thanks to our Germany-based logistics infrastructure.
Solutions.s6Desc: Comprehensive after-sales technical support including installation, calibration, maintenance, and spare parts supply.
Solutions.ctaTitle: Let's Find the Right Solution for Your Project Together
Solutions.ctaDesc: Contact us for your laboratory equipment needs. We'll provide you with the best solution.

Footer.description: Your trusted partner in laboratory equipment.
